description:
Generate or retrieve short-lived MDI workflow URLs for sensitive clinical sub-flows when MDI should own the interaction.

**Scope**
- Implement helpers for the launch-approved embedded workflows from T-079.
- Ensure URLs are short-lived, user-scoped, and never logged in full.
- Use patient-safe fallback states when URL creation fails or MDI is unavailable.

**Acceptance**
- Dashboard can request an embedded URL for each approved launch workflow.
- Full URLs/tokens do not appear in logs, analytics, or support metadata.
- Expired/missing URL states are handled gracefully.
title: MDI embedded workflow URL helpers
